misconfig_patterns: ClickHouse-compatible interface: default user with empty password
MSTG vector index DDL detectable via SHOW CREATE TABLE
Port 8123 shared with standard ClickHouse — discriminator required

active_probe.false_positive_check: version() output or /api/v1/info must contain MyScale or myscale string to distinguish from plain ClickHouse

deployment_tells: ClickHouse HTTP interface: GET /?query=SELECT+1 returns Ok. without auth
MSTG index DDL in SHOW CREATE TABLE for vector tables
pivot_paths: GET /?query=SELECT+version() → identify MyScale vs plain ClickHouse
GET /?query=SHOW+CREATE+TABLE+{t} → detect MSTG vector index DDL
